title: Recursive Skill Synthesis Protocol
requirements: Autonomous identification of 'Learned Patterns' from session logs.
Skill Codification: Automatically generate SKILL.md and manifest logic.
Validation Gate: Ensure new skills don't conflict with existing OMEGA-tier protocols.
Registration: Automated entry into the master REGISTRY.md.

logic.audit: Self-test the new skill in a temporary 'Sandboxed-Shard'.

compliance.sovereignty: Skills must adhere to MENA/Law 151 architectural standards.
compliance.transparency: Human-readable reasoning log for every synthesized skill.
